items.prompt: Photorealistic fitness app instructional still image of Push-ups. Use the provided model reference only as the adult fitness model, outfit-style, body-type, and realism reference. Do not include the reference background. One adult athletic woman only. Tasteful fitness app instructional presentation. Natural realistic face, proportionate body, realistic hands and feet. Full body visible. Neutral modern gym, clean wall or equipment backdrop, no mirrors showing extra people, stable fixed camera, bright professional lighting. No text, no logos, no watermark, no extra people, no distorted hands, no distorted limbs, no unsafe posture. Demonstrate the top position of a full-body push-up on a mat: hands under shoulders, body in a straight line from head to heels, core braced, feet together, elbows extended but not locked, gaze slightly forward/down. Camera at low three-quarter side angle, full body and mat visible.
items.note: Validated single test request reused as final asset.

Photorealistic fitness app instructional still image of Leg Press. Use the provided model reference only as the adult fitness model, outfit-style, body-type, and realism reference. One adult athletic woman only. Tasteful fitness app instructional presentation. Natural realistic face, proportionate body, realistic hands and feet. No text, no logos, no watermark, no extra people, no distorted hands, no distorted limbs, no unsafe posture. Side view of a proper 45-degree leg press machine. Model is seated with back and hips fully against the back pad, both feet flat and clearly visible shoulder-width on the large foot platform, knees bent around 90 degrees tracking over toes, hands gripping side handles. The sled rails, large foot platform, seat pad, and full body are clearly visible. Do not show a hack squat or seated curl machine.

Photorealistic fitness app instructional still image of Dumbbell Lateral Raise. Use the provided model reference only as the adult fitness model, outfit-style, body-type, and realism reference. One adult athletic woman only. Tasteful fitness app instructional presentation. Natural realistic face, proportionate body, realistic hands and feet. Full body visible, neutral modern gym, clean equipment backdrop, no mirrors showing extra people, fixed camera, bright professional lighting. No text, no logos, no watermark, no extra people, no distorted hands, no distorted limbs, no unsafe posture. Model stands tall with two dumbbells raised out to the sides in a true lateral raise, arms nearly straight with only a soft elbow bend, dumbbells level with shoulders, palms facing down or slightly forward, shoulders down, torso still. Straight-on camera, full body visible, enough space around both arms. Avoid goalpost arms, shoulder press, or biceps curl positions.

Photorealistic fitness app instructional still image of Dead Bug. Use the provided model reference only as the adult fitness model, outfit-style, body-type, and realism reference. One adult athletic woman only. Tasteful fitness app instructional presentation. Natural realistic face, proportionate body, realistic hands and feet. Full body visible, neutral modern gym, clean equipment backdrop, no mirrors showing extra people, fixed camera, bright professional lighting. No text, no logos, no watermark, no extra people, no distorted hands, no distorted limbs, no unsafe posture. Camera from diagonal overhead angle. Model lies on her back on a mat with low back gently pressed into mat. Show the classic dead bug position clearly: right arm extended overhead close to the floor, left leg extended straight close to the floor, left arm vertical above shoulder, right knee bent 90 degrees above hip. Full body and mat visible. Avoid crunch, bicycle crunch, yoga, or floating limbs.

Photorealistic fitness app instructional still image of Doorway Chest Stretch. Use the provided model reference only as the adult fitness model, outfit-style, body-type, and realism reference. One adult athletic woman only. Tasteful fitness app instructional presentation. Natural realistic face, proportionate body, realistic hands and feet. Full body visible, neutral modern gym, clean equipment backdrop, no mirrors showing extra people, fixed camera, bright professional lighting. No text, no logos, no watermark, no extra people, no distorted hands, no distorted limbs, no unsafe posture. Model stands in a doorway or beside a vertical rack upright with one forearm pressed against the vertical frame, elbow bent exactly around 90 degrees at shoulder height, upper arm horizontal, chest gently rotated away from the frame, shoulders down, posture tall. Full body visible from a side three-quarter angle, doorway/rack frame clear. Avoid simply standing beside a pole; show the forearm contact and chest-opening stretch.

Photorealistic fitness app instructional still image of Doorway Chest Stretch. Use the provided model reference only as the adult fitness model, outfit-style, body-type, and realism reference. One adult athletic woman only. Tasteful fitness app instructional presentation. Natural realistic face, proportionate body, realistic hands and feet. Full body visible, neutral modern gym or clean studio doorway, no mirrors, no extra people, fixed camera, bright professional lighting. Show a clear classic pec doorway stretch: the model stands side-on inside an open doorway, left forearm and palm flat against the vertical door frame, elbow bent exactly 90 degrees and held at shoulder height, upper arm horizontal, chest rotated away from the frame, right arm relaxed at her side, shoulders down, neck neutral, feet staggered. The single vertical door frame must touch her forearm; do not show both hands on a rack. No text, no logos, no watermark, no distorted hands, no unsafe posture.
items.retry_reason: Doorway stretch v2 did not show clear forearm-on-frame chest stretch
